versions.name: Krupp Scout Hollow
versions.summary: Grand Teton Council Cub Scout day camp at Scout Hollow near Rigby, Idaho, for Cub Scouts in grades K–5, offering archery, BB guns, crafts, and nature hikes.

provenance.notes: Name corrected 2026-07-22 (community/data-quality review): 'Cub Scout Day Camp at Krupp Scout Hollow' was a scraped registration-event title; renamed to the property name, verified against the council's camp listing. Prior id 'id-cub-scout-day-camp-at-krupp-scout-hollow' retired (resolves via aliases.json). Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). verified_at is camp-finder's own source-confirmation date; imported_at is when open-scout-api ingested it. The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
